text: columns: ESRD risk scores are renormalized to the ESRD population, disabled risk scores are renormalized to the disabled population, aged/dual risk scores are renormalized to the aged/dual population, and aged/non-dual risk scores are renormalized to the aged/non-dual population. Therefore ESRD, disabled, aged/dual, and aged/non-dual risk scores are not on the same scale and are not comparable.
